category_sources: Official Virtuoso homepage describes a unified data platform for SQL, SPARQL, REST, linked data, and knowledge graphs.
source_facts.description says Virtuoso is a high-performance object-relational SQL database.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Virtuoso Universal Server.
docs_sources: Official OpenLink documentation site is the dedicated documentation surface for Virtuoso.
source_facts.homepage identifies OpenLink's official Virtuoso site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/openlink/virtuoso-opensource, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Virtuoso as a multi-model RDBMS, data integration middleware, linked data deployment, and HTTP application server platform.
source_facts.description identifies an object-relational SQL database.
